Codex Windows APP 终于发布了

而且他们为这个东西专门做了一个 AI 原生的 Agent 沙盒，用来跑一些敏感权限之类的。

更重要的是这部分还是开源的，所以如果你在做类似产品，就可以参考它的设计和代码

 https://t.co/JajCgAAsci
Google Workspace 也有 cli 了

It is amazing how many companies I talk to STILL have AI effectively blocked by IT & legal departments for out-of-date reasons when many companies in highly regulated industries have figured out ways to deploy enterprise ChatGPT, Claude & Gemini without any apparent problem.

The funny thing about this kind of tweet is that it brings out a bunch of guys who claim to be “experts in AI safety.”

And then you look into their backgrounds and it turns out they’ve just been yelling about it for a long time + belong to an influential polycule 🙃

There are

某种意义上的独立思考能力测试
只有 Claude 堪用
Qwen3.5 也意外有一定能力

M5 相比 M4 的大模型推理速度提升
竟然在 3 倍以上。 https://t.co/6EG6Fj5o2P

RT @seclink: 和Gemini对了一下，大概知道Qwen这次啥事情：

原先Qwen的500+人团队，不断要钱，不断要卡，也没有KPI考核。

但是最后效果都还不如minimax取巧蒸馏出来的小模型的成果，总体烧的钱（成本）贵10x倍不止。

对高管而言，都只是黑盒子…
